function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_19__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_21__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_19__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi,

Replying with the four oldest invoices linked to Claudia Reiter at Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH.

Best,
Miles

details: VALIDATOR: You're mutating files while still GATHERING_INFORMATION. Decide your outcome direction before making changes.

next_step.current_state: Outbound draft was written successfully. Verification check: attachment paths were all previously read exact invoice files; ordering is newest-first among the four oldest requested invoices; recipient matches Miles canonical email; subject quoting is YAML-safe. Still need to complete inbox workflow by deleting the processed inbox item, then report completion.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md for Miles with four exact Helios invoice attachments.

next_step.current_state: Completed the inbox request: verified sender identity from Miles canonical record, resolved the tax-firm client via Claudia/Helios canonical evidence, read the four oldest linked invoice records, wrote the reply draft with attachments newest-first, and deleted the processed inbox file. No security trigger was found in the inbox note or source invoices.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after creating the outbound draft reply.

function.message: Processed the inbound note by drafting a reply to miles@novak.example with the four oldest Helios-linked invoices attached. The draft is saved at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md, and the inbox item was deleted.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap requirements (tree, root AGENTS, context), read system workflow docs before task work, used inbox email header as canonical metadata, verified sender via Miles primary_contact_email, used canonical entity evidence to resolve the Helios tax-firm client, respected finance sensitivity rules, created the outbound email in 60_outbox/outbox using the sending-email schema, ordered attachments newest-first, and deleted the inbox file only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: OUTCOME_OK is supported by canonical evidence: 10_entities/cast/miles.md confirms the sender email miles@novak.example; 10_entities/cast/claudia.md identifies Claudia Reiter as a consulting client at helios-tax.example; the four invoice files dated 2025-11-19, 2025-12-21, 2026-01-19, and 2026-02-19 each show counterparty Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH and related_entity Claudia Reiter. Those are the four oldest Helios-linked invoices, and they were attached to the reply draft in newest-first order as required.
